en: If your company is required to comply with Taiwan's Labor Insurance requirements, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).

All employers in Taiwan must enroll eligible employees in Labor Insurance under the supervision of the Bureau of Labor Insurance (BLI), Ministry of Labor, as mandated by the Labor Insurance Act and related regulations.
Is your company required to comply with Taiwan's Labor Insurance requirements as regulated by the Bureau of Labor Insurance and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Descriptions of an insured and an ineligible individual can be found in Section 3 of the Labor Insurance Act.
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from complying with Taiwan's Labor Insurance requirements.
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees.
The company does not have any employees in Taiwan.
The company is a civil service, a state-run school solely employing teachers, or a military branch, covered by another insurance scheme.
